title: amaranthus lividus var. ascendens
intro: Amaranthus lividus var. ascendens, also known as common amaranth, is a plant species belonging to the amaranth family (Amaranthaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Amaranthus lividus var. ascendens is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a poultice or compress to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
